See how an Italian luxury brand accelerated global expansion without compromising on customer experience.

Giorgio Armani runs global B2C on XY Retail
140 stores in 8 countries in 60 days
XY Retail helps beauty and cosmetics brands deliver discovery-driven, loyalty-fueled experiences—in-store, online, and everywhere in between.
Beauty moves fast—but expectations move faster. Disconnected systems, scattered profiles, and rigid promotions make it hard to deliver the personalized experiences today’s customers demand.
Rapid SKU turnover andseasonal launches
Fragmented experiencesbetween online and in-store
Loyalty disconnected fromday-to-day service
No centralized profile forpreferences, skin type, or history
Promotions hard to personalizeacross regions and channels

XY Retail brings every touchpoint together, empowering store associates, stylists, and service teams with real-time customer insight, localized tools, and seamless workflows. From boutique floor to brand HQ, it’s one platform that does it all.
Quick checkout, samplingtriggers, and product returns
Profiles, skin/hair preferences,past purchases, outreach
Real-time availability,new launch visibility
Tiered programs, coupons,and targeted incentives
Product engagement, offer redemption,customer lifetime value

In beauty, it starts with a spark—but loyalty takes intention. XY Retail equips brands with the tools to turn one-time buyers into lifelong customers through smart discovery, seamless sampling, and personalized outreach—online and off.

From product discovery to post-purchase loyalty, XY Retail helps beauty brands deliver measurable impact at every stage. Smarter tools, deeper engagement, and faster execution—proven across global markets.
Trusted byBeauty Leaders
Live with brands like PUPAacross 30+ countries.
Loyalty redemptions up 30%post-POS integration.
Double-digit improvement insampling-to-purchase conversion
Product Launch,Streamlined
Faster onboarding with connectedinventory + training tools.
From luxury fashion to consumer electronics, XY Retail adapts to your vertical—delivering modular tools, fiscal compliance, and retail innovation that scales with your business.
